pros: he loves anything quantitative so he'll prob add more quantitative questions than qualitative in your quizzes and exams.

name: Nazia Perwaiz
one_line_summary: Very good teacher, explained concepts clearly, gave tough but fair assignments and tests.
pros: gave tough but fair assignments and tests

name: Neelma Naz
one_line_summary: Mixed reviews, some praise her teaching and grading, while others criticize her for being biased and egoistic.
recommended_for: students who are willing to follow her attendance policy and can handle surprise quizzes
teaching_style: Focuses on concepts and tests them, uses example problems to practice.

name: Neelma Riaz
one_line_summary: An outstanding English teacher who teaches with passion and dedication.
cons: does not know how to teach at all
teaching_style: paper is also from slides mostly

name: Nosherwan Shoaib
one_line_summary: Goated teacher, great at RF & MW stuff, but can be difficult and unfriendly.
cons: Isn't too nice of a person
Will screw you over later and be a total stranger
Won't consider any student below 3 cgpa
recommended_for: Students with 3.0 CGPA or higher, RF & MW courses
teaching_style: Can be difficult and unfriendly, but initially sweet talks students

name: Qaiser Riaz
one_line_summary: Knows a lot about cloud computing but has poor teaching skills and high expectations.
pros: knows a lot about cloud computing
cons: high expectations for assignments and projects
doesn't mention what he wants in assignments and projects

name: Qazi Waqas Mohyuddin
one_line_summary: Absolute legend. Attendance and lab grades were never an issue in the five courses he handled as lab engineer.
pros: Chillest man I've seen in a long time.
Attendance and lab grades were never an issue
cons: I want what ever he is high on.
recommended_for: Students looking for a relaxed and easy grading experience
teaching_style: Lab engineer, relaxed and easy grading

name: Quanita Kiran
one_line_summary: Serious and strict, but decent teacher academically.
cons: strict for the sake of being strict
recommended_for: students who focus on coursework and don't get noticed
teaching_style: strict and serious, but effective for some students

name: Rabia Irfan
one_line_summary: Chill teacher, but unorganized and scattered course.
cons: course outline wasn't clear till the end

name: Rafia Ahmad
one_line_summary: GOOD GRADING, kind of drools over the cool guys of the class. OVERALL KIND BUT STRICT TO ATTENDANCE AND LAB DEADLINES AND MARKS tho gives really good marks if good work done.
pros: kind of drools over the cool guys of the class
OVERALL KIND BUT STRICT TO ATTENDANCE AND LAB DEADLINES AND MARKS
gives really good marks if good work done
cons: STRICT TO ATTENDANCE AND LAB DEADLINES AND MARKS
teaching_style: kind of drools over the cool guys of the class

name: RAFIA MUMTAZ
one_line_summary: Personality with BIIGG EGO, great researcher but horrible at teaching
pros: Does the most for SEECS in terms of research and fundings and grants
cons: Sometimes unable to convey the concepts properly
Develops an image of each batch and then treats them as such
recommended_for: Students who are willing to work hard and are associated with her
teaching_style: Demanding, expects students to work hard

name: Rai Sajjad Saif
one_line_summary: Excellent teacher who makes concepts easy to understand.
pros: Tells jokes to keep students interested
cons: Unable to develop mathematical foundations necessary for AI/ML/DL
Teaches no concept and gives steps to memorize
Tells students off if they look away

name: Rehan Zahid
cons: Please purchase my fiverr gig and I will give you one hour lecture and you will understand all about this lecture.

name: Rizwan Ahmad
one_line_summary: Reads slides, lenient marking, but not engaging.

name: Saad Bin Qaisar
one_line_summary: Doesn't know half the stuff he's teaching.
cons: Doesn't know half the stuff he's teaching
Goes off about his entrepreneurial ventures frequently, wasting time.

name: Saadi Ishaq
one_line_summary: Strict but very professional. Has great knowledge of all his courses.
pros: can explain the material with accuracy
cons: mids are easy, but his finals are quite difficult

name: Saeed Afzal
one_line_summary: Professor Saeed Afzal is a knowledgeable but disorganized teacher who cares about his students.
recommended_for: students who can keep up with his teaching style
teaching_style: lectures can be hard to follow due to filler words and mumbles
